audience_policies.source_phrase: This coupon enables you to purchase a Heritage Pass, at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. One-time use only. Visit plimoth.org/plan-your-visit for up to date visitor information, or call Plimoth Patuxet Museums at 508-746-1622.
